input.instructions: Analyze the specific claim regarding 'beta < 1/6' as a mass gap threshold in lattice Yang-Mills theory. Evaluate the validity of the 'B^2 formula' proof mentioned in the context of the Yang-Mills mass gap problem. Identify if there is a known 'irreparable gap' in this specific line of reasoning and determine the correct threshold or alternative derivation if the claim is false.

orchestration.decision_notes: The child nodes have only provided summaries of their intent to search. I need to actually execute the search queries to retrieve the technical data required to evaluate the 'beta < 1/6' threshold and the 'B^2 formula'.
